app.title: Vitamin D
app.subtitle: Global Solar Explorer
app.footer: Astronomical calculations + real UV data (Open-Meteo). Vitamin D estimation based on Holick/Dowdy (2010). Map: Natural Earth. Search: OpenStreetMap Nominatim. Threshold 45° (in vitro) / 50° (conservative).

hero.searchHint: Search your city to find out if you can synthesize vitamin D today
hero.forVitD: to synthesize ~1000 IU of vitamin D
hero.noSynthesisTitle: Vitamin D synthesis is not possible today
hero.noSynthesisHint: The sun does not reach the required elevation in
hero.adviceText: Consider oral vitamin D supplementation (800-2000 IU/day) during months with low UV radiation.
hero.gpsTimeout: Could not get your location in time
hero.gpsEnableHint: Make sure location/GPS is enabled on your device (Settings > Location/GPS)

skin.help: How to identify your skin type?
skin.fitzpatrickHint: Think about how your skin reacts after 30 min of summer sun without protection:
skin.desc1: Very pale skin, freckles, blond/red hair. Always burns, never tans.
skin.desc2: Fair skin, blond hair. Burns easily, tans little.
skin.desc3: Medium skin, brown hair. Sometimes burns, tans gradually.
skin.desc4: Olive skin, dark hair. Rarely burns, tans well.
skin.example5: Middle East, South Asia, North Africa

auth.hasAccount: Already have an account — Log in
auth.loginHint: Log in to sync your preferences across devices
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account

notifications.unsupported: Notifications not available in this browser
notifications.deniedHint: Notifications blocked. In Chrome: click the lock icon in the address bar > Permissions > Notifications > Allow. Then reload the page.

search.placeholder: Search any city in the world...

estimate.title: Vitamin D Estimate
estimate.theoreticalHint: (theoretical clear sky — no weather data for this date)
estimate.insufficientUV: Insufficient UV (UVI < 3) — vitamin D synthesis not possible on this date
estimate.disclaimerTheoretical: Theoretical estimate with clear sky (no clouds or real data). Real weather data only covers ~14 days.
estimate.disclaimerReal: Based on Holick's rule (Dowdy et al. 2010). Indicative estimate — does not replace medical advice.
